testcase.name: Home Page Test
testcase.system-out: beforeALL -- server is up and running!! beforeEach -- user is logged in!! home page test afterEach -- logout!! afterAll -- close browser

testcase.name: Search Product Test
testcase.system-out: beforeALL -- server is up and running!! beforeEach -- user is logged in!! Search Product test afterEach -- logout!! afterAll -- close browser

testcase.name: Cart Test
testcase.system-out: beforeALL -- server is up and running!! beforeEach -- user is logged in!! Cart test afterEach -- logout!! afterAll -- close browser
